title: gentianella aspera subsp. sturmiana
intro: Gentianella aspera subsp. sturmiana, also known as the Alpine Gentian, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the gentian family, characterized by its small, blue-purple flowers and slender stem. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Gentianella aspera subsp. sturmiana include its potential to alleviate digestive problems, such as bloating and gas, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory issues. Gentianella aspera subsp. sturmiana can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
